title: YouTube vs TikTok
context: Creator economy, content distribution, platform strategy, and audience building
surface_question: Which platform is better for creators?
a_root: A searchable, durable video library with long-form depth and recommendation systems.
b_root: An algorithmic discovery engine optimized for rapid attention bursts.
a_causal_chain: search + recommendation -> longer content -> library building -> subscriber trust -> durable attention
b_causal_chain: For You feed -> fast hook -> rapid distribution -> trend participation -> attention spike
hidden_difference: TikTok accelerates discovery. YouTube stores durable attention.
a_failure_mode: YouTube fails when content is not searchable, retained, or trusted over time.
b_failure_mode: TikTok fails when fast attention does not convert into owned audience or durable trust.
conditional_verdict: Use TikTok for fast discovery. Use YouTube for durable content infrastructure.
final_line: TikTok accelerates discovery. YouTube stores durable attention.
